title: No hunger in Lunge
description: Using Lunge III on a spear prevents hunger loss, consuming 1 durability instead.
body:
🍖 **No Hunger in Lunge**
Stop starving while you wait! A lightweight utility to disable hunger loss in specific areas.

📖 **Description**
No Hunger in Lunge is a simple yet essential Datapack for Minecraft 1.21.1. It is designed to solve a common annoyance: players losing hunger and saturation while AFK, waiting in lobbies, or hanging out in specific zones (the "Lunge").

Whether you are running a minigame server, a parkour map, or just want a safe spawn area, this datapack ensures your players keep a full food bar without needing to constantly eat.

✨ **Key Features**
Zero Hunger Loss: Automatically replenishes saturation and food levels.

Performance Friendly: Extremely lightweight code with no TPS lag.

Plug & Play: Works immediately upon installation.

Multiplayer Ready: Fully compatible with servers and single-player worlds.

Vanilla Compatible: No mods required, pure vanilla commands.

⚙️ **How it Works**
The datapack applies a saturation effect (or constantly refills the food bar) to players within the specific parameters or dimensions set by the pack. It removes the need for "Peaceful" mode, allowing you to keep mob spawning on while disabling the starvation mechanic.

📥 **Installation Guide**
Download the .zip file.

Open your Minecraft world (or server) folder.

Navigate to the datapacks folder.

Drag and drop the No Hunger in Lunge file into the folder.

In-game, type /reload (if you are an OP) or restart the server.

Done! Your players are now safe from starvation.


(Note: Adjust these commands based on your actual function names)

⚠️ Compatibility
Minecraft Version: 1.21.1

Loader: Vanilla Datapack
